name: Indian Premier League
description: The Indian Premier League is one of the world's most popular T20 cricket tournaments.

name: ICC T20 World Cup
description: The ICC T20 World Cup is the premier international T20 cricket tournament.

name: ICC Champions Trophy
description: The ICC Champions Trophy features the world's top ODI teams.

name: The Ashes
description: The Ashes is the historic Test cricket rivalry between England and Australia.

name: Pakistan Super League
description: The Pakistan Super League is Pakistan's premier T20 cricket competition.

name: Big Bash League
description: Australia's leading T20 cricket competition.

name: SA20
description: South Africa's premier franchise T20 league.

name: Major League Cricket
description: The leading professional T20 cricket league in the United States.

name: Asia Cup
description: The Asia Cup features the top cricket nations from Asia.

name: The Hundred
description: England's 100-ball cricket competition featuring city-based franchises.

name: FIFA World Cup
description: The FIFA World Cup is the world's premier international football tournament featuring 48 national teams.

name: UEFA European Championship
description: The UEFA European Championship is the premier international football tournament for European national teams.

name: Copa América
description: The Copa América is the main international football tournament for South American national teams.

name: Africa Cup of Nations
description: The Africa Cup of Nations is the premier international football tournament for African national teams.

name: AFC Asian Cup
description: The AFC Asian Cup is the premier international football tournament for Asian national teams.

name: Premier League
description: The Premier League is England's top professional football league and one of the most watched sports competitions in the world.

name: UEFA Champions League
description: The UEFA Champions League is Europe's premier club football competition featuring the top teams from across the continent.

name: La Liga
description: La Liga is Spain's top professional football league and features some of the best teams and players in the world.

name: Bundesliga
description: The Bundesliga is Germany's top professional football league and features some of the best teams and players in the world.

name: Serie A
description: Serie A is Italy's top professional football league and features some of the best teams and players in the world.

name: Wimbledon
description: Wimbledon is the world's oldest and most prestigious tennis tournament, played on grass courts in London.

name: US Open
description: The US Open is one of the four Grand Slam tennis tournaments, played on hard courts in New York City.

name: Australian Open
description: The Australian Open is one of the four Grand Slam tennis tournaments, played on hard courts in Melbourne.

name: French Open
description: The French Open, also known as Roland Garros, is one of the four Grand Slam tennis tournaments, played on clay courts in Paris.

name: ATP Finals
description: The ATP Finals features the top eight men's singles players and doubles teams of the season.

name: Formula 1 World Championship
description: The FIA Formula One World Championship is the highest level of international motorsport competition.

name: IndyCar Series
description: The NTT IndyCar Series is the premier level of American open-wheel racing.

name: Formula E
description: The ABB FIA Formula E World Championship is a class of motorsport that uses only electric-powered cars.

name: Monaco Grand Prix
description: The Monaco Grand Prix is one of Formula 1's most iconic races, held on the streets of Monte Carlo.

name: British Grand Prix
description: The British Grand Prix at Silverstone is one of the oldest and most celebrated races in Formula 1.

name: Italian Grand Prix
description: The Italian Grand Prix at Monza is one of the fastest and most historic races on the Formula 1 calendar.

name: Abu Dhabi Grand Prix
description: The Abu Dhabi Grand Prix at Yas Marina Circuit traditionally concludes the Formula 1 season.
